name: Xbox

bios.notes: Original Xbox emulation commonly requires machine files or firmware-like data supplied by the user; do not store or infer those files.

library_behavior.playlist_target_preference: XISO image or default.xbe inside extracted game folder

notes: Do not convert ISO/XISO images, rewrite extracted folders, or store machine files without explicit user approval.

confidence_notes: xemu workflows vary by frontend; keep repairs dry-run unless target launch format is confirmed.
notes: Redump-style images and emulator-ready XISO images are not interchangeable for every workflow.
